issues.title: api_version mismatch
issues.symptom: Request used "1.0.0" but skill expected "v1" - caused INVALID_REQUEST error
issues.root_cause: The skill contract schema enforces strict version format that does not match common semantic versioning patterns
issues.suggested_fix: Accept both formats (1.0.0 and v1) with normalization to canonical format; add clear error message showing expected format

issues.title: field naming inconsistency
issues.symptom: Request used "test_set_refs" (plural) but skill expected "test_set_ref" (singular) - caused missing field error
issues.root_cause: Schema inconsistency between documentation and implementation; unclear naming conventions
issues.suggested_fix: Accept both singular and plural forms with deprecation warning for plural; update schema to be more forgiving

issues.title: path resolution issues
issues.symptom: Relative paths not resolved - skill expected absolute paths for test_set_ref and test_environment_ref
issues.root_cause: Path resolution logic does not normalize relative paths against repo_root or workspace_root
issues.suggested_fix: Add path normalization that resolves relative paths against repo_root; provide clear error showing searched paths

issues.title: workspace root confusion
issues.symptom: Skill execution in worktree vs E: drive workspace caused path mismatches
issues.root_cause: No clear detection or documentation of which workspace root should be used; git worktrees create different path contexts
issues.suggested_fix: Add workspace root detection logic; document expected workspace root in skill README; handle git worktree scenarios

issues.title: Playwright dependency failure
issues.symptom: npm test:e2e script not found - required creating fake npm/playwright scripts
issues.root_cause: No dependency validation or setup guidance before attempting test execution
issues.suggested_fix: Add pre-flight dependency checks with helpful setup instructions; fail fast with clear guidance if dependencies missing

issues.title: coverage unavailable
issues.symptom: E2E execution completed but coverage data unavailable (simulation mode)
issues.root_cause: Simulation mode bypasses actual test execution but does not produce coverage artifacts that downstream expects
issues.suggested_fix: When in simulation mode, produce coverage_report.json with simulated flag; document coverage limitations

issues.title: multiple retry attempts
issues.symptom: Required 5+ iterations to get skill execution working
issues.root_cause: Errors discovered sequentially rather than in a single validation pass; each fix revealed a new error
issues.suggested_fix: Implement comprehensive pre-validation that collects ALL errors before failing; return complete error list

issues.title: error message gaps
issues.symptom: Some error messages did not clearly indicate root cause (e.g., yaml file not found for path issues)
issues.root_cause: Error messages report symptoms rather than root causes; missing context about what was searched and where
issues.suggested_fix: Improve error messages to include context, searched paths, and suggestions; show what was expected vs what was found
